programme.title: Memoirs 5 May
programme.desc: Memoirs 5 May

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: The flavors of land and sea are brought together in the kitchen, with prawn linguine, a light and savory pasta dish brimming with fresh Mediterranean seafood. For dessert, galaktompoureko, a traditional Greek custard-filled pastry with golden, crispy layers, provides a sweet and indulgent finale. An episode celebrating the best of classic Mediterranean cuisine.

programme.title: Med Nations 01 Italy
programme.desc: The heart of Italy! A place where old empires, the brilliance of the Renaissance, and modern passion all come together. Italy shows itself through its traditions, flavours, and lively way of life. From the timeless beauty of Rome to the artistic heart of Florence and the vibrant energy of Naples, Italy is alive with life. It's a journey through a country that has had a profound impact on art, cuisine, and culture throughout the Mediterranean and beyond.

programme.title: OSN Kubrick - Musica e cinema d'autore
programme.desc: From the Rai Arturo Toscanini Auditorium in Turin, the Rai National Symphony Orchestra, conducted by Min Chung, presents a symphonic concert dedicated to the iconic soundtracks from Stanley Kubrick's films. The programme features orchestral interpretations of memorable scores that have shaped Kubrick's cinematic legacy, blending classical masterpieces with evocative film music for a powerful and immersive experience.

programme.title: Med Destinations Rimini
programme.desc: Med Destinations visits Rimini, Italy’s seaside gem, where golden beaches meet rich history. From Roman ruins to vibrant nightlife, Rimini offers the perfect mix of culture and coastal charm.

programme.title: Vivi e lascia vivere
programme.desc: Laura’s double life grows more complicated as her past threatens to unravel everything she has built. Her children struggle with their own dilemmas, sensing the growing tension around them. Toni’s presence becomes increasingly dangerous, forcing Laura to take drastic measures. As secrets come to light, betrayal and unexpected alliances shape her next move.

programme.title: Confusione
programme.desc: Everything seems to be going well and Francesco's Km0 supermarket is finally ready. The Mazzuccato family, in a festive atmosphere, is on the verge of crisis: Eros is going through a dark period and Olivia is about to face the secret that she has been carrying with her for almost forever.

programme.title: The Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: The tale of Prometheus, the Titan who defied Zeus by giving fire to humanity. His act of rebellion sparks divine punishment, as he is bound and tortured for eternity. Through striking imagery, the story reveals themes of sacrifice, defiance, and the price of progress.

programme.title: Opera - Salome
programme.desc: The 87th Festival of the Maggio Musicale Fiorentino opens with Richard Strauss's Salome, conducted by Alexander Soddy. Directed by Emma Dante, this new production features Lidia Fridman as Salome, Anna Maria Chiuri as Herodias, and Nikolai Schukoff as Herodes. The performance blends Strauss's intense musical drama with a fresh and dynamic staging.

programme.title: Memoirs 5 May
programme.desc: Memoirs 5 May

programme.title: Whats On Books Literature Innovation and Learning
programme.desc: Great ideas are the lifeblood of the Mediterranean and this week we are following them from the written page to the boardroom. We start at the Malta Book Festival, where the local community gathers to celebrate the stories that define the islands. Our journey then takes us to Cyprus for the Nicosia Book Fest to see how literature creates a unique bridge between cultures. In Spain, we wander the famous leafy avenues of the Madrid Book Fair, where Retiro Park becomes one of the largest outdoor libraries in the world. We wrap up at the historic Mediterranean Conference Centre in Valletta for the EU Startup Summit, where the creative energy of storytelling meets the high-stakes world of global innovation. This is a look at the parks and the halls where the next chapter of the Mediterranean is being written.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Jesenice
programme.desc: In the hillside village of Staro Selo Jesenice, with views of the central Dalmatian islands, we found stone houses, a bocce court, and a traditional tavern run by Ante Bajso. There, he treated us to a Dalmatian classic—meat slow-cooked under a bell-shaped lid, peka.

programme.title: Med Minds 05 Plato
programme.desc: Plato, the philosopher of Athens, questioned life, truth, and society, leaving ideas that still shape the world.

programme.title: Med Nations 01 Italy
programme.desc: The heart of Italy! A place where old empires, the brilliance of the Renaissance, and modern passion all come together. Italy shows itself through its traditions, flavours, and lively way of life. From the timeless beauty of Rome to the artistic heart of Florence and the vibrant energy of Naples, Italy is alive with life. It's a journey through a country that has had a profound impact on art, cuisine, and culture throughout the Mediterranean and beyond.

programme.title: Med Whats On Extraordinary Events
programme.desc: Spring is transforming the Mediterranean into a massive stage for high-tech art and spectacular outdoor events. We begin at the Ta Qali National Park for the Bloom Festival, where wellness and music create a vibrant sanctuary in the heart of Malta. From there, we head into the tunnels and forts of Valletta and Birgu for the Malta Biennale 2026 to discover contemporary installations hidden inside historic sites rarely seen by the public. Our journey takes us to the cliffs of Gozo as giant creative designs fill the sky for the International Kite and Wind Festival before we land in Venice to witness the world class creativity of the 61st International Art Exhibition. This is a look at a region in the middle of a stunning cultural rebirth.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Amalfi
programme.desc: Malini Angelica travels to Italy’s stunning Amalfi Coast, exploring its dramatic cliffs, colorful seaside towns, and crystal-clear waters. From the charm of Positano and Amalfi to the tranquility of Ravello, she experiences the region’s beauty, cuisine, and coastal lifestyle. Malini captures the magic that makes the Amalfi Coast one of Italy’s most breathtaking destinations.

programme.title: Tuscanys Dolce Vita
programme.desc: We enjoy the charms of rural Tuscany's "sweet life" as we hunt for truffles in an oak forest, nibble on artichokes, and cruise through cypress groves in a classic convertible.

programme.desc: Greece has a culture that has been shaped by hundreds of years of ideas, traditions, and life on the sea. This trip shows how Greece still inspires the Mediterranean and the world through its food, music, and long history.

programme.title: Med Minds 06 Jean de Valette
programme.desc: Jean Parisot de Valette, the steadfast Grand Master of Malta, led the Knights with courage, defended his island, and saved Europe as we know it.

programme.title: La linea de la memoria
programme.desc: Rafael works in the port of Cádiz. He is a ship captain who spent many years sailing. His father was a historian and together they wrote a great book on the history of the port of Cádiz. Miguel is Rafael's friend since childhood. He is a big fan of sailing and travel around the world twice. The two protagonists are determined that the city of Cádiz recovers its glorious historical memory. Especially, the part concerning one of the most interesting episodes related to the Sea: the history of the Meridian of Cádiz (“zero Meridian”), valid for one hundred years in the eighteenth century for all the navigators of the world. Throughout the documentary, we know Rafael and Miguel and also their activities aimed at enhancing the history of the city. Finally, a group of students, in a very eye-catching action, “draw” with a red cloth the ancient meridian on the streets, squares and roofs of the city.

programme.title: Brač (Supetar)

programme.desc: Step into the fairytale beauty of Lake Bled, Slovenia, on Med Destinations. Crystal-clear waters, a picturesque island church, and lush Alpine surroundings make it a serene Mediterranean escape.

programme.title: Med Nations 06 Spain
programme.desc: Explore Spain, a country where sun-drenched beaches converge with vibrant cities steeped in centuries of history. From the artistic avenues of Barcelona to the lively Mediterranean ports, Spain presents a dynamic blend of culture, cuisine, and coastal traditions that embody its distinctive Mediterranean spirit.

programme.title: MED Destination ANTIPAROS
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Malini Angelica Napoli
programme.desc: Malini Angelica visits Naples, in Italy’s vibrant Campania region. She dives into the city’s beautiful chaos to uncover the heart of Neapolitan culture, sampling delicious street food, meeting friendly locals, and exploring its rich history. With its authenticity and energy, Naples stands out as one of Italy’s most captivating cities.

programme.title: il pane, le torte, la pizza
programme.desc: Accompany, contain, support: three key concepts defining Italy's iconic culinary creations—bread, cakes, and pizza. Bread, a fundamental staple, complements dishes while holding symbolic meaning. Savory pies, rooted in medieval tradition, have remained unchanged through centuries. Lastly, pizza, an ancient grain-based dish, achieved global fame after merging with tomatoes in Naples. Massimo Montanari leads us through this rich and flavorful journey.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Slowing down to savor Burgundy's historic, scenic, and edible delights, we revel in the rich traditions of this serene region, where nature is as sophisticated as the people.

programme.title: The Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: The tale of Psyche, a mortal of extraordinary beauty, sparks the jealousy of Venus, who sends her son Cupid to curse her with a monstrous love. Instead, Psyche captures Cupid's heart, but her betrayal of his trust breaks their fragile bond. Determined to reunite with him, Psyche endures a series of divine trials. In the end, the gods grant her immortality, and their love prevails—an enduring myth of trust, redemption, and the power of true devotion.

programme.title: Madame Butterfly Teatro Alla Scala 2016
programme.desc: In Madama Butterfly (Teatro alla Scala, 2016), a young Japanese woman enters into a marriage with an American naval officer, filled with hope for a new life. As time passes, the contrast between her expectations and reality becomes more profound. The opera unfolds with deep emotional intensity, leading to a powerful and poignant conclusion.

programme.title: Concerto - Schubert e Strauss per Mariotti e OSN
programme.desc: The Rai National Symphony Orchestra, under the baton of conductor Michele Mariotti, presents a captivating performance featuring the works of Franz Schubert and Richard Strauss. The programme showcases Schubert's rich melodies and lyrical compositions alongside Strauss's dynamic and expressive pieces, offering a journey through the Romantic and late-Romantic musical landscapes. The orchestra's interpretation highlights the depth and emotional power of these renowned composers, creating a memorable concert experience.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Split (Firule)
programme.desc: In Split’s Firule neighborhood—home to Croatia’s tennis greats—we discovered more than just sport. Renowned chef Hrvoje Zirojević welcomed us with a taste of tradition: pivac na tingul, a classic Dalmatian stew made with tender young rooster.

programme.title: Med Minds 06 Jean de Valette
programme.desc: Jean Parisot de Valette, the steadfast Grand Master of Malta, led the Knights with courage, defended his island, and saved Europe as we know it.

programme.title: Med Nations 02 Greece
programme.desc: Greece has a culture that has been shaped by hundreds of years of ideas, traditions, and life on the sea. From the ancient wonders of Athens to the sun-drenched islands of the Aegean, Greece shows this. This trip shows how Greece still inspires the Mediterranean and the world through its food, music, and long history.

programme.title: Film and Cinema Festivals
programme.desc: Film and Cinema Festivals

programme.title: Malini Angelica Morocco MARRAKESH
programme.desc: Join Malini Angelica in Marrakesh, Morocco, as she dives into the heart of this ancient city—discovering its vibrant local life, rich history, and cultural heritage. Then, travel with her beyond the city walls to explore centuries-old kasbahs, including the legendary Ait Ben Haddou.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: We explore the dramatic castles, prehistoric cave paintings, and prized cuisine of the Dordogne River Valley, with its unforgettable blend of man-made and natural beauty.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: Full of hearty, traditional flavors, this dish features barley bread, a rustic and wholesome staple, paired with black-eyed beans cooked to perfection for a satisfying and nutritious meal. An episode celebrating the simplicity and richness of timeless Mediterranean recipes.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Med Destination - Dubrovnik
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destination - Dubrovnik
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Memoirs 9 May
programme.desc: Memoirs 9 May

programme.title: Med Nations 13 Albania
programme.desc: Along the Adriatic and Ionian coasts of Albania. From the charming streets of Vlora to sun-drenched beaches and historic towns, Albania reveals a vibrant blend of Mediterranean culture, history, and seaside traditions waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Med Minds 07 Dali
programme.desc: Salvador Dalí, the eccentric Mediterranean visionary, turned his life into art and became one of history’s most unforgettable minds.

programme.title: La linea de la memoria
programme.desc: Rafael works in the port of Cádiz. He is a ship captain who spent many years sailing. His father was a historian and together they wrote a great book on the history of the port of Cádiz. Miguel is Rafael's friend since childhood. He is a big fan of sailing and travel around the world twice. The two protagonists are determined that the city of Cádiz recovers its glorious historical memory. Especially, the part concerning one of the most interesting episodes related to the Sea: the history of the Meridian of Cádiz (“zero Meridian”), valid for one hundred years in the eighteenth century for all the navigators of the world. Throughout the documentary, we know Rafael and Miguel and also their activities aimed at enhancing the history of the city. Finally, a group of students, in a very eye-catching action, “draw” with a red cloth the ancient meridian on the streets, squares and roofs of the city.

programme.title: MED Destination ANTIPAROS
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: MED Destination ITHAKA

programme.title: Med Destinations Pula
programme.desc: Discover Pula, Croatia, with Med Destinations. Famous for its Roman amphitheater and charming old town, Pula combines historical grandeur with Adriatic seaside beauty.

programme.title: Split (Firule)
programme.desc: In Split’s Firule neighborhood—home to Croatia’s tennis greats—we discovered more than just sport. Renowned chef Hrvoje Zirojević welcomed us with a taste of tradition: pivac na tingul, a classic Dalmatian stew made with tender young rooster.

programme.title: Med Nations 13 Albania
programme.desc: Along the Adriatic and Ionian coasts of Albania. From the charming streets of Vlora to sun-drenched beaches and historic towns, Albania reveals a vibrant blend of Mediterranean culture, history, and seaside traditions waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Whats On Sports Across the Mediterranean
programme.desc: The Mediterranean celebrates athleticism. Italy hosts The Torino Royal Marathon and Maratona Reale, while France Roc d Azur brings mountain biking excitement. Croatia CRO Race showcases professional cycling, and Cyprus hosts both the Limassol Marathon and Leptos Cyprus 4 Day Challenge. From road races to endurance challenges, sports unite communities along stunning Mediterranean landscapes.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine
programme.desc: The spotlight falls on two traditional Cypriot favorites. First, we explore the art of preparing Oven Lamb Kleftiko, a slow-cooked dish where tender lamb is infused with herbs and baked to perfection, capturing the essence of village cooking. Then, the journey continues with Kattimeria, fried sweet flatbreads that balance crisp texture with a hint of indulgent sweetness. Together, these recipes showcase the comforting richness and variety of Cyprus’s culinary heritage.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: For many travelers, the quintessence of Spain is found in Andalucía. Join us in Granada, Córdoba, and the Costa del Sol as we enjoy the food, history, art, and dance of Europe's most passionate corner.

programme.title: MED Destination ANTIPAROS
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Blockchain in Real Estate Panel
programme.desc: As blockchain moves from theory to practice, this panel examines its growing role in real estate. Speakers unpack how decentralised systems are changing transactions, ownership records, and trust, while addressing the challenges of regulation, scalability, and industry readiness in today’s market.

programme.title: Med Nations 13 Albania
programme.desc: Along the Adriatic and Ionian coasts of Albania. From the charming streets of Vlora to sun-drenched beaches and historic towns, Albania reveals a vibrant blend of Mediterranean culture, history, and seaside traditions waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Memoirs 9 May
programme.desc: Memoirs 9 May

programme.title: Med Minds 07 Dali
programme.desc: Salvador Dalí, the eccentric Mediterranean visionary, turned his life into art and became one of history’s most unforgettable minds.

programme.title: il pane, le torte, la pizza
programme.desc: Accompany, contain, support: three key concepts defining Italy's iconic culinary creations—bread, cakes, and pizza. Bread, a fundamental staple, complements dishes while holding symbolic meaning. Savory pies, rooted in medieval tradition, have remained unchanged through centuries. Lastly, pizza, an ancient grain-based dish, achieved global fame after merging with tomatoes in Naples. Massimo Montanari leads us through this rich and flavorful journey.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: In Milan we'll take a peek at Italy's highest fashion, fanciest delis, grandest cemetery, and greatest opera house...not to mention Leonardo's "Last Supper." Then we'll cruise Lake Como, settling down in the lakeside village of Varenna.

programme.title: Whats On Books Literature Innovation and Learning
programme.desc: Great ideas are the lifeblood of the Mediterranean and this week we are following them from the written page to the boardroom. We start at the Malta Book Festival, where the local community gathers to celebrate the stories that define the islands. Our journey then takes us to Cyprus for the Nicosia Book Fest to see how literature creates a unique bridge between cultures. In Spain, we wander the famous leafy avenues of the Madrid Book Fair, where Retiro Park becomes one of the largest outdoor libraries in the world. We wrap up at the historic Mediterranean Conference Centre in Valletta for the EU Startup Summit, where the creative energy of storytelling meets the high-stakes world of global innovation. This is a look at the parks and the halls where the next chapter of the Mediterranean is being written.

programme.title: Malini Alexandria
programme.desc: Malini Angelica heads to Alexandria, Egypt’s Mediterranean city, exploring its blend of Greek, Roman, and Egyptian history. With a lively student scene, fresh seafood, and a relaxed seaside vibe, she discovers why Alexandria is an underrated, modern-feeling escape.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Sommer explores the bustling city of Ahmedabad and later visits the contrastingly tranquil, Sabarmati ashram, the home of Mahatma Gandhi.

programme.title: Xplore India
programme.desc: On the last leg of her journey in Chhattisgarh, Aradhana uncovers the hidden world of the state’s artistic legacy.

programme.title: Burn Appetit
programme.desc: On his way from Zillertal to Innsbruck, Jolly makes some rather fascinating pit-stops that lead him to uncover shades of Austria’s heritage.

programme.title: Xp Guide
programme.desc: Český Krumlov Castle is one of the most important monuments in Central Europe in terms of architectural standard, cultural tradition and scale.

programme.title: 10 Days Sri Lanka
programme.desc: Sabrina Bussandri visits the iconic sights of Colombo, and goes on to take a river safari and visit a turtle hatchery in Bentota.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: Alex Drobin experiences the North American energy and European charm of Montreal as he explores all that the city has to offer.

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Summer Shiels gets to know Goa through experiences like shipwreck diving, finding deserted beaches and meeting an artist inspired by the state.

programme.title: Xplore Thailand
programme.desc: Speeding tuk-tuks, the revered Emerald Buddha and a grand fairytale in the heart of the city. Welcome to the capital city of Thailand - Bangkok.

programme.title: Burn Appetit
programme.desc: In Vienna, Jolly chances upon a Baroque palace that houses mysteries of not only the world in which we live but also of the heavens above.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: From the famous deer meat pie of Aux Ancies Canadiens to the art on Rue Du Tresor, Alex Drobin soaks in the vibes of sophisticated yet playful Quebec.

programme.title: Burn Appetit
programme.desc: On the way to Graz from Vienna, Jolly makes an unexpected discovery: a medieval castle on a volcano, which is home to a dungeon of witches.

programme.title: 10 Days Sri Lanka
programme.desc: Sabrina Bussandri loses herself in the colonial hangover of Galle

programme.title: Backpack
programme.desc: Sommer wraps her stay in Goa with some shopping and heads to Badami. Take a journey back in time to the Bhootnath temple dedicated to God of spirit.

programme.title: Xp Guide
programme.desc: With a rich history dating back to over 1000 years, Oslo’s iconic monuments reveal its evolution through the ages to visitors.

programme.title: Xplore Thailand
programme.desc: Shop at the popular khlongs, snuggle to little tiger cubs and watch ladyboys sashaying to the latest beats. Watch Xplore Thailand, featuring Bangkok.

programme.desc: From the famous deer meat pie of Aux Ancies Canadiens to the art on Rue Du Tresor, Alex Drobin soaks in the vibes of sophisticated yet playful Quebec.

programme.title: Xplore Thailand
programme.desc: Shop at the popular khlongs, snuggle to little tiger cubs and watch ladyboys sashaying to the latest beats. Watch Xplore Thailand, featuring Bangkok.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s adventures in Perth kick off with him immersing himself in the historic grandeur of the Scone Castle, where a mysterious stone tells tales of Scottish monarchs. But the real thunder of the Highlands awaits at the Braemar Games gathering, where tartan meets brawn, and Robbie learns that embracing his Scottish side involves more than just kilts and castles.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Novi Sad, the financial and industrial hub of Serbia.Starting with canoeing on Danube and later exploring the city and its landmarks.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Santa Village at Rovaniemi, where she reads some of the letters that children from around the world write to him.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: Luxurious hotels, thrilling water parks, inexpensive food and almost 300 days of bright sunny weather make Bulgaria’s biggest seaside resort, Sunny Beach popular for budget beach getaways. Catriona, however, stumbles onto the historic town of Nessebar, which is over 3000 years old, and realizes that there is more to the place than meets the eye. She goes on to visit the Castra Rubra winery, where she finds out about the history of Viticulture in Bulgaria and the process of wine making.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: Benafsha embarks on a whirlwind adventure in Ahmedabad. With just 48 hours in the city, she is determined to make the most of it, but how?

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: From exploring a vintage car museum to scaling a 5 meter ice-wall and sampling a rich bread cookie, Watch Alex exploring The Hague, also known as the “International city of peace”.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: A modern European oil city built on the back of a rich maritime heritage, Aberdeen is the energetic kingpin of northeast Scotland. While the boom times may come and go, the dynamic coastal metropolis never ceases to thrill with its free museums, outdoor adventures and natural attractions right on the city’s doorstep.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Požarevac and visits the ancient town of Viminacium. Later visits National Museum, concluding with Majdanpek’s Rajkova Pecina Caves.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Rovaniemi, where she visits a husky farm and finds out about about breeding and raising huskies.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: For the people of Sofia, preserving its heritage is sacrosanct, and this can be seen in the way the city's infrastructure is built around its archeological treasures. Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: From lazing in hammocks by the beach to sipping drinks on a private yacht, Kim realizes that Maldives is the perfect destination to unwind in style.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: From trying dishes like Stroopwafel and Palat Stoofvlees to visiting the Erasmus bridge, cube houses and wall painting on the streets, Alex explores Rotterdam.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Since medieval times Aberdeenshire and its northwestern neighbour Moray have been the richest and most fertile regions of the Highlands. Aberdeenshire is famed for its Aberdeen Angus beef cattle, its many fine castles and the prosperous 'granite city' of Aberdeen.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Explore Majdanpek with our host as the city brings the viewers closer to the treasures strewn across the Serbian countryside.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Levi is Finland's largest and fastest-growing ski destination. Emeline is here, to find out the exciting activities that Levi offers, in summer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: With snow-capped peaks rising over primeval forests and traditional villages, Paro is like an Oriental Switzerland. On a visit to Paro, Radhika explores famous monasteries such as the Rinpung Dzong and Takstang Monastery, and learns the history and legends associated with them. Along the way, she finds out the secrets to the quintessential Bhutanese peace and contentment.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.desc: An invigorating spa treatment, a cooking lesson, a snorkeling session – Kim has experiences in the Maldives that leave her completely rejuvenated.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: From trying Orange zest beer and traditional Dutch dishes to exploring St.Martin's Cathedral, Dom Tower and enjoying go karting and stand up paddle boat ride, watch Alex enjoy his trip in Utrecht.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: In the enchanting landscapes of Inverness, Robbie’s journey takes a whimsical turn: from eccentric to downright magical.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Nis,one of the oldest cities in Europe.She visits a concentration camp and later paraglides to end by watching a musical performance.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Emeline goes to Ruka-Kuusamo, where she tries river rafting. She also meets a reindeer herder,who tells her about the unique ways of herding reindeer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Actress and travel enthusiast, Radhika Bangia explores the enigma that is Bhutan, when she visits Thimpu, the capital city with no traffic lights and no skyscrapers invading the skyline. Here, she checks out significant sights such as the Tibetan-style National Memorial Chorten, the National Library and the Folk Heritage Museum in order to understand more about the beliefs, history, architecture and cuisine of Bhutan.

programme.title: World Heritage
programme.desc: Explore the ancient heritage sites of Abu Simbel, the Philae complex of Nubia and the Hatshepsut Temple to unravel the mystical stories behind the ancient temples of Egypt.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: Alex tries traditional Dutch food in Leiden, learns about Dutch history at Prinsenhof Museum, visits a Gothic church, a local cheese market and Delftware factory at Gouda.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: The grand finale of Robbie’s wild homecoming unfolds amidst the rugged beauty of the Isle of Skye.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Continue exploring Serbia with Heather as she visits the Manasija monastery, Resavska caves, ending with a joyride onboard Eight of Sargan rail line.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.desc: Krisann and Nathan’s vacation in Mauritius begins in Le Morne, where an unexpected adventure awaits the latter.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Known as Druk Yul or the “Land of the Thunder Dragon”, Bhutan is the country of mountains, monasteries and mystery. Radhika Bangia finds this to be true when she visits Punakha, the former capital of Bhutan, where she marvels at the architecture of Punakha Dzong and gets to know the story behind the two rivers, Mo Chhu and Po Chhu. She also explores the sacred temples and Mebar Tsho lake of Bumthang, the religious heart of Bhutan, and gets to know the local legends.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries out spa treatments, which are inspired by the Dead Sea and the desert surroundings at Hotel Kempinski Ishtar in Jordan.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: After Burj Khalifa, Alex has a traditional Emirati platter, visits the gold market and skiing rink, and goes for a camel safari and camping.

programme.title: City break
programme.desc: Nestled in the mighty Alps, tour the Austrian city of Innsbruck with Sabrina and explore a town that’s alpine-urban yet traditional in nature.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: In her final leg of journey, Heather visits the Uvac canyon, tries locally prepared pie, ending with Kopaonik National Park and Jelovarnik waterfalls.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.desc: On an island-hopping adventure in Mauritius, Krisann and Nathan find out that time works differently on these islands.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.desc: A homely place where the aroma of freshly baked bread greets you as people smoothly glide along on their bicycles. Welcome to Copenhagen.

programme.title: Unwind
programme.desc: Indeya explores the Cinnamon plantations, tries a local dish and witnesses a traditional dance performance.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: Alex has varied experiences in Dubai like trying Lebanese cheese bread, visiting a coffee museum, going to IMG Worlds of Adventure and more.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: In Amsterdam, Alex tries Bitterballen, cannabis cake and visits Heineken Experience brewery. He explores Zaanse Schans village with windmills and Coster Diamonds, the oldest diamond polishing factory.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. As Catriona takes a tour of the city to see its iconic attractions such as a Roman Amphitheatre, which was once the setting for gladiator fights, and the striking Baroque Saints Constantine and Helena Church, she begins to see how seamlessly modern life blends with the age-old ruins. Along the way, she realizes why Plovdiv is called the ‘Eternal City’ of Bulgaria.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.desc: Stockholm, the capital and largest city of Sweden, was built on 14 Islands. This place is also sometimes referred as Venice of the north.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: This exhilarating city of castles, beer and segway rides can take you on a break that will truly leave you catching your breath.

programme.desc: Visit Belgrade, with Heather as she explores the city, its architecture and learns about its past by visiting historical monuments.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: In the enchanting landscapes of Inverness, Robbie’s journey takes a whimsical turn: from eccentric to downright magical.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Nis,one of the oldest cities in Europe.She visits a concentration camp and later paraglides to end by watching a musical performance.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.desc: Emeline goes to Ruka-Kuusamo, where she tries river rafting. She also meets a reindeer herder,who tells her about the unique ways of herding reindeer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Actress and travel enthusiast, Radhika Bangia explores the enigma that is Bhutan, when she visits Thimpu, the capital city with no traffic lights and no skyscrapers invading the skyline. Here, she checks out significant sights such as the Tibetan-style National Memorial Chorten, the National Library and the Folk Heritage Museum in order to understand more about the beliefs, history, architecture and cuisine of Bhutan.

programme.title: World Heritage
programme.desc: Explore the ancient heritage sites of Abu Simbel, the Philae complex of Nubia and the Hatshepsut Temple to unravel the mystical stories behind the ancient temples of Egypt.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: Alex tries traditional Dutch food in Leiden, learns about Dutch history at Prinsenhof Museum, visits a Gothic church, a local cheese market and Delftware factory at Gouda.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: The grand finale of Robbie’s wild homecoming unfolds amidst the rugged beauty of the Isle of Skye.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Continue exploring Serbia with Heather as she visits the Manasija monastery, Resavska caves, ending with a joyride onboard Eight of Sargan rail line.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.desc: Krisann and Nathan’s vacation in Mauritius begins in Le Morne, where an unexpected adventure awaits the latter.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Known as Druk Yul or the “Land of the Thunder Dragon”, Bhutan is the country of mountains, monasteries and mystery. Radhika Bangia finds this to be true when she visits Punakha, the former capital of Bhutan, where she marvels at the architecture of Punakha Dzong and gets to know the story behind the two rivers, Mo Chhu and Po Chhu. She also explores the sacred temples and Mebar Tsho lake of Bumthang, the religious heart of Bhutan, and gets to know the local legends.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita Joe e Marco Chirico, al nuovo Marco Polo ristorante, il ristorante è stato appena ristrutturato ed ha un look fresco e moderno. Oltre a preparare le ricette del nuovo menù, Ornella prepara una ricetta con un ospite speciale, Monsignor Jamie Gigantiello, Monsignore Gigantiello prepara la ricetta della nonna, polpette di melenzane. Nel ristorante accanto Chef Marco prepara sfizi per i fan di Brindiamo! tra cui una pizza degli spiedini e un super cocktail. (2014)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita uno dei nuovi trendy ristoranti nel Village in New York City." Rafele" ristorante. Ornella e Chef Raffaele Ronca, prima di iniziare il loro viaggio culinario, fanno shopping al "Green market"a Union Square. Oltre a preparare ricette tipiche Napoletane,lo chef preprara alcune ricette con ingredienti Calabresi e per concludere in dolcezza e Bellezza prepara una sua super specialità la famosa torta di ricotta una delle "Cheese cake' più famose di New York. (2014)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita il ristorante Angelina's on the Water per conoscere il nuovo chef Matteo Calciati, oltre a preparare le ricette del nuovo menù del ristorante Ornella vi apre le porte dell' esclusivo Gala annuale che presenta per la NOIAW ( National Organizazion Italian American Woman) dove intervista il simpatico e frizzante Dott. OZ. (2014)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita "Amo" ristorante, che si trova nel museo Amo di Verona. Con lo chef Vincenzo Buonocore, Ornella prepara alcune ricette fuori menù, e insieme al sommelier Niccolò Petrilli, scelgono il vino perfetto per ogni piatto. Visita alcune delle cantine più interessanti del territorio ed intervista il vice sindaco della città di Verona Dott. Stefano Casali. (2014)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado si trova in Piemonte per scorpire il territorio e visitare alcuni ristoranti stellati. In questa puntata Ornella visita la Reggia di Venaria, dove il Re del ristorante "Dolce Stil Novo", chef Alfredo Russo prepara nella spaziosa e super moderna cucina delle prelibatezze tipiche piemontesi. Ornella visita anche la scuola di restauro e parla con la responsabile della scuola Dr.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita Washington DC e va a scoprire un ristorante proprio a due passi dalla Casa Bianca, il ristorante si chiama "Luigino", il proprietario e chef è Carmine Marzano. Chef Marzano prepara delle ricette tipiche piemontesi. Ospite della trasmissione la bellissima Adrianna Sgarlata Miss Virginia 2006. (2006)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita chef Cesare Casella nel suo ristorante nel Village "Maremma" per preparare alcune delle sue ricette preferite. Con Cesare Ornella visita upstate un allevamento di maiali e mucche Chianine. Cesare Casella oltre ad essere un bravissimo chef è anche uno stimatissimo insegnate, è infatti il Dean del programma di cucina italiana all' "International Culinary Center" a Soho ed Ornella è andata a trovarlo con le telecamere di Brindiamo!.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita il ristorante "Il Circo" nel cuore di Manhattan, dove conosce la signora Egidiana autrice di diversi libri di cucina. Dopo aver preprato alcune specialità del ristorante, Ornella visita il Re della ristorazione francese al ristornate Le Cirque. Il Signore Mauro Maccioni in una intervsita racconta ad Ornella la sua favolosa carriera nella ristorazione.(2007)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: In questa puntata, Ornella Fado conduce un favoloso evento dedicato alla Regione Calabria da Eataly Downtown, preparando ricette insieme allo chef calabrese Luca Caligiuro e allo chef italo-americano Ryan Rizzuto.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Ornella Fado è a Milano, all'EXPO, con i giovani della Basilicata del progetto Sano è Lucano. I prodotti tipici lucani ispirano una serie di incontri culinari: dalla barca alla Mondadori, fino a Lady Bu Bistrò e al ristorante stellato Il Luogo di Aimo e Nadia con lo chef Fabio Pisani.Il racconto è arricchito dagli interventi di Sara Farnetti e Pietro Bitonti.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: In questa puntata, Ornella Fado conduce un favoloso evento dedicato alla Regione Calabria da Eataly Downtown, preparando ricette insieme allo chef calabrese Luca Caligiuro e allo chef italo-americano Ryan Rizzuto.

programme.title: Eccellenze Italiane con Piero Muscari intervista a Heinz Beck
programme.desc: Pietro Muscari intervista Lorenzo Suraci, Presidente di RTL 102.5. Lorenzo rivela come ha iniziato a lavorare con celebrità come Maurizio Costanzo e Bruno Vespa e quali sono i progetti futuri per la prima radio in Italia.

programme.title: Eccellenze Italiane con Piero Muscari intervista a Heinz Beck
programme.desc: Pietro Muscari intervista Enrico Vaime, autore e conduttore radio e TV. Con Enrico si parla di radio, tv, libri, ma anche di amore e dispiaceri che hanno formato la sua carriera.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita cinque amici ristoratori durante le feste Natalizie, prima tappa" Angelina's" a Staten Island, poi e` la volta di "Marco Polo" e "Luzzo" a Brooklyn. A Manhattan nell'Upper East side, Ornella visita "83 e mezza". Ultima tappa per ujn buon gelato,"Dolce Gelateria" nel Village. (2013)

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli
programme.desc: Benvenuti a questo nuovo episodio del Circolo dei Buongustai! Cosa bolle in pentola? Oggi il nostro chef Fabio Campoli ci delizierà con tre ricette speciali: cono di stesa, venere nera, e babà al bergamotto. Buona visione a tutti!

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli
programme.desc: Benvenuti a questo nuovo episodio del Circolo dei Buongustai! Cosa bolle in pentola? Oggi il nostro chef Fabio Campoli ci delizierà con tre ricette speciali: portafoglio di squacquerone, ciliegie e mortadella, riso rosso integrale con pollo e peperoni, diplomatico alle rose. Buona visione a tutti!

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli
programme.desc: Benvenuti a questo nuovo episodio del Circolo dei Buongustai! Cosa bolle in pentola? Oggi il nostro chef Fabio Campoli ci delizierà con tre ricette speciali: rotolo di riso, prosciutto e melone, risotto alla rucola con kiwi e vongole, e budino di riso. Buona visione a tutti!

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Continuano le audizioni di Antonio Fini e dei suoi giudici per selezionare i migliori danzatori da invitare al prestigioso festival di danza in NEW YORK. I ragazzi affrontano le tre sfide previste: portare il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di Hip hop con Mirco Giordano e Marcello Gargarelli.

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Terza ed ultima puntata della serie. Antonio Fini ed i suoi giudici sono pronti: chi sceglieranno per volare a NEW YORK per il prestigioso festival della danza? Ancora una volta i ragazzi devono convincere l'importante giuria con il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di danza "tecnica Parson" con la maestra Abby Silva.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: La puntata di oggi è ricca di contenuti. Ornella Fado incontra Cristina Carrani, esperta in materia immobiliare che aiuterà Ornella a scoprire l'Isola di Capri. Dalla moda alla storia, al cibo e all'arte, Brindiamo! Edizione speciale Capri è l'episodio perfetto per festeggiare i 18 anni di Brindiamo! su NYC LIFE.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova nel laboratorio di Urbani Truffle a New York per la serconda parte di Brindiamo! in my kitchen. I suoi amici chef in questa puntata son lo chef Raffaele Ronca, lo Chef Marco Chirico e il giovane pizzaiolo Ettore Toches. In questa edizione di Brindiamo! in my Kitchen la musica è dal vivo con la soprano Cristina Fontanelli ed il compositore Jhon La Barbera, tra gli ospiti di questa puntata il Fashion designer Domenico Vacca. (2016)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita cinque amici ristoratori durante le feste Natalizie, prima tappa" Angelina's" a Staten Island, poi e` la volta di "Marco Polo" e "Luzzo" a Brooklyn. A Manhattan nell'Upper East side, Ornella visita "83 e mezza". Ultima tappa per ujn buon gelato,"Dolce Gelateria" nel Village. (2013)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado continua il suo giro per incontrare il suoi amici ristoratori durante le festività di capodanno. Visitando a midtown Chef Pino alla "La Masseria", chef Stefano e Franco a " Viceversa", a "PizzArte" incontra il pizzaiolo Roberto ed il proprietario Dario, a Queens visita "Ornella Trattoria" dove incontra Vincenzo e "Trattoria l'Incontro"dove incontra lo chef e proprietario Rocco. (2013/2014)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita il ristorante di "Angelina's" a Staten Island per preparare alcune ricette con Vincent Malerba proprietario del ristorante, ospite di eccezione la cantante Giada Valenti che oltre a preparare una ricetta con Vincent racconta ad Ornella il suo sogno americano. (2016)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado con lo chef Raffaele Ronca, visitano il famoso ristorante giapponese "Sushi Nakasawa", oltre a preprare sushi con Chef Nakasawa, lo chef Raffaele Ronca prepara un piatto a quattro mani con Daisuke Nakasawa e poi un sei mani con Alessandro Borgognone, co- proprietario del ristorante, questa puntata fa parte della stagione speciale "Brindiamo! International Cuisine". (2016)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: In questo epsiodio di Brindiamo! Ornella Fado fa un viaggio dei suoi momenti televisivi. Intervista il famoso chef Joy Campanaro e con chef Ronca preparano gli spaghetti alla chitarra, fa visita a Vincenzo Cutrone allo stabilmento di Brooklyn, "Octopus Garden", presenta una competizione per la regione Basilicata al ristorante Marco Polo, e visita lo chef Marcello Russodivito che festeggia 30 anni del ristorante e conduce un concerto a Suffern NY. (2016)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita nuovamente "Luzzo Pizzeria" per fare una chiaccherata con Michele Iuliano. Michele e` un pizzaiolo napoletano proprietario di diversi ristoranti in New York, Michele è anche ideatore di un piccolo forno itinerante. Oltre a preparare delle pizze classiche nel forno tradizionale, Michele prepara delle pizze nel suo nuovo forno su ruote, di fronte al suo ristorante.

programme.title: My Talented Friends Season 1
programme.desc: Ornella Fado introduce il suo amico Geniale Julian Gargiulo, un talentuosissimo compositore e pianista on uno spiccato senso dell'umore, Julian e` il protagnosita e regista di un documentario girato al Carnegie Hall di New York, durante una competizione ideada dal maestro Gargiiulo.

programme.title: My Talented Friends Season 1
programme.desc: Ornella Fado introuce il suo amico Geniale Marco Napoli, attore e regista televisivo e cinematografico. Il documentario di oggi vede come protagonista una giovane artista catanese Roberta Finocchiaro "Save lives with the Rhytm.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita nuovamente "Luzzo Pizzeria" per fare una chiaccherata con Michele Iuliano. Michele e` un pizzaiolo napoletano proprietario di diversi ristoranti in New York, Michele è anche ideatore di un piccolo forno itinerante. Oltre a preparare delle pizze classiche nel forno tradizionale, Michele prepara delle pizze nel suo nuovo forno su ruote, di fronte al suo ristorante.

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Nella prima puntata Antonio Fini ed i suoi giudici incontrano il primo gruppo di ballerini.Per essere selezionati per il prestigioso festival di danza in NEW YORK devono affrontare 3 sfide: presentare il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di danza "tecnica Graham" con il maestro Antonio Fini.

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Continuano le audizioni di Antonio Fini e dei suoi giudici per selezionare i migliori danzatori da invitare al prestigioso festival di danza in NEW YORK. I ragazzi affrontano le tre sfide previste: portare il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di Hip hop con Mirco Giordano e Marcello Gargarelli.

programme.title: Change your Destiny
programme.desc: Terza ed ultima puntata della serie. Antonio Fini ed i suoi giudici sono pronti: chi sceglieranno per volare a NEW YORK per il prestigioso festival della danza? Ancora una volta i ragazzi devono convincere l'importante giuria con il loro pezzo migliore, la contemporary battle e la lezione di danza "tecnica Parson" con la maestra Abby Silva.

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli
programme.desc: Benvenuti a questo nuovo episodio del Circolo dei Buongustai! Cosa bolle in pentola? Oggi il nostro chef Fabio Campoli ci delizierà con tre ricette speciali: portafoglio di squacquerone, ciliegie e mortadella, riso rosso integrale con pollo e peperoni, diplomatico alle rose. Buona visione a tutti!

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli
programme.desc: Benvenuti a questo nuovo episodio del Circolo dei Buongustai! Cosa bolle in pentola? Oggi il nostro chef Fabio Campoli ci delizierà con tre ricette speciali: rotolo di riso, prosciutto e melone, risotto alla rucola con kiwi e vongole, e budino di riso. Buona visione a tutti!

programme.title: My Talented Friends Season 1
programme.desc: Ornella Fado introduce il suo amico Geniale Julian Gargiulo, un talentuosissimo compositore e pianista on uno spiccato senso dell'umore, Julian e` il protagnosita e regista di un documentario girato al Carnegie Hall di New York, durante una competizione ideada dal maestro Gargiiulo.

programme.title: My Talented Friends Season 1
programme.desc: Ornella Fado introuce il suo amico Geniale Marco Napoli, attore e regista televisivo e cinematografico. Il documentario di oggi vede come protagonista una giovane artista catanese Roberta Finocchiaro "Save lives with the Rhytm.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita cinque amici ristoratori durante le feste Natalizie, prima tappa" Angelina's" a Staten Island, poi e` la volta di "Marco Polo" e "Luzzo" a Brooklyn. A Manhattan nell'Upper East side, Ornella visita "83 e mezza". Ultima tappa per ujn buon gelato,"Dolce Gelateria" nel Village. (2013)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado incontra un vero gentiluomo della ristorazione italiana a Filadelfia, Giuseppe Giuliani, patron de "La Buca". Giuseppe oltre a preparare alcune ricette toscane, racconta l'avventura dell'apertura atipica e fuori programma del ristorante per ospitare il Maestro Luciano Pavarotti in tour a Filadelfia.(2006)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita una delle pizzerie piu` autentiche di New York,con uno dei 5 forni a legna più antichi della città`. "Luzzo" Pizzeria si trova a due passi dal quartiere trendy, il Village. Con Michele Iuliano, pizzaiolo napoletano di grande esperienza, Ornella prepara delle deliziose pizze, alcune tradizionali come la classica margherita ed alcune con un twist. Ospite della puntata il giovane talento Italiano il tenore Luciamo La Monarca.(2008)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita uno dei ristoranti più belli d'Europa, "Don Alfonso 1890" dove incontra la famiglia Iaccarino. Oltre a preparare le ricette nella bellissima cucina con chef Ernesto Iaccarino, Ornella intervista Livia Iaccarino, la prima sommelier donna in Italia, la signora Iaccarino racconta la bellissima storia della famiglia di Don Alfonso, che ha fatto dell' ospitalità la sua stroria.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita due ristoranti di eccellenza, San Pietro e Masseria. Al San Pietro Ornella incontra i fratelli Bruno, con lo chef Antonio prepara delle ricette gustose del classico menù del ristorante, mentre Gerardo racconta la storia del rstorante ed il successo dei loro ristoranti. Da Masseria Ornella incontra lo Chef e Patron Pino Coladonato, e preparano delle ricette tipiche pugliesi.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita" Via Oreto", un ristorante dal cuore siciliano. Antony prepara le ricette della nonna e della mamma. Accanto la nonna a visionare tutto. In questo episodio Ornella intervsita un esperto del vino siciliano Pietro Cavallo, e parlano dell'importanza di abbinare il giusto vino ad ogni piatto.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: La puntata di oggi è ricca di contenuti. Ornella Fado incontra Cristina Carrani, esperta in materia immobiliare che aiuterà Ornella a scoprire l'Isola di Capri. Dalla moda alla storia, al cibo e all'arte, Brindiamo! Edizione speciale Capri è l'episodio perfetto per festeggiare i 18 anni di Brindiamo! su NYC LIFE.

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado incontra chef Rocco Sacramone al ristorante Trattoria "l'Incontro", Chef Rocco, condivide alcune delle ricette più amate dai suoi clienti incluso una dolcissima pizza alla nutella. (2008)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado incontra un vero gentiluomo della ristorazione italiana a Filadelfia, Giuseppe Giuliani, patron de "La Buca". Giuseppe oltre a preparare alcune ricette toscane, racconta l'avventura dell'apertura atipica e fuori programma del ristorante per ospitare il Maestro Luciano Pavarotti in tour a Filadelfia.(2006)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita una delle pizzerie piu` autentiche di New York,con uno dei 5 forni a legna più antichi della città`. "Luzzo" Pizzeria si trova a due passi dal quartiere trendy, il Village. Con Michele Iuliano, pizzaiolo napoletano di grande esperienza, Ornella prepara delle deliziose pizze, alcune tradizionali come la classica margherita ed alcune con un twist. Ospite della puntata il giovane talento Italiano il tenore Luciamo La Monarca.(2008)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita il ristorante toscano "Pepolino" dove prepara delle saporite ricette con lo chef Patrizio, per chiudere in "Dolcezza e Bellezza" Enzo prepara una delle cheese cake piu` famose di New York.(2007).

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita uno dei ristoranti più eleganti di Manhattan a due passi da Central Park il "San Domenico ristorante". Nella cucina del ristorante Ornella assiste Odette Fada nella preparazione dei classici piatti Italiani. Ospite della puntata la giovane stilista Nicole Romano. Ornella Fado indossa alcune creazioni della sua collezione. (2007)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita una delle più belle scuole di cucine upstate in New York la "CIA" Culinary Institute of America, dove visita il ristorante "Caterina dei Medici", e con lo chef Scapin preprano alcune ricette del menù della scuola. (2007)

programme.title: Brindiamo!
programme.desc: Questa puntata fa parte della serie vintage. Ornella Fado visita Raffaele Trovato, direttore dell'IFSE, a Piobesi Torinese, oltre a visitare la bellissima scuola, Ornella prepara delle ricette con l'istruttore del centro.(2009)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova nel laboratorio di Urbani Truffle a New York ed invita i suoi amici chef per preparare insieme delle ricette da gustare durante le festività natalizie. In questa puntata Chef Pino Coladonato, Chef Marcello Russodivito e la giovane pizzaiola Giorgia Caporuscio. In questa edizione di Brindiamo! in my Kitchen ospite speciale la soprano Cristina Fontanelli e John La Barbera, oltre a vari ospiti del mondo dello spettacolo, e della moda. (2016)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova nel laboratorio di Urbani Truffle a New York per la serconda parte di Brindiamo! in my kitchen. I suoi amici chef in questa puntata son lo chef Raffaele Ronca, lo Chef Marco Chirico e il giovane pizzaiolo Ettore Toches. In questa edizione di Brindiamo! in my Kitchen la musica è dal vivo con la soprano Cristina Fontanelli ed il compositore Jhon La Barbera, tra gli ospiti di questa puntata il Fashion designer Domenico Vacca. (2016)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado visita cinque amici ristoratori durante le feste Natalizie, prima tappa" Angelina's" a Staten Island, poi e` la volta di "Marco Polo" e "Luzzo" a Brooklyn. A Manhattan nell'Upper East side, Ornella visita "83 e mezza". Ultima tappa per ujn buon gelato,"Dolce Gelateria" nel Village. (2013)

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado continua il suo giro per incontrare il suoi amici ristoratori durante le festività di capodanno. Visitando a midtown Chef Pino alla "La Masseria", chef Stefano e Franco a " Viceversa", a "PizzArte" incontra il pizzaiolo Roberto ed il proprietario Dario, a Queens visita "Ornella Trattoria" dove incontra Vincenzo e "Trattoria l'Incontro"dove incontra lo chef e proprietario Rocco. (2013/2014)

programme.title: Eccellenze Italiane con Piero Muscari intervista a Heinz Beck
programme.desc: Pietro Muscari intervista la regista e sceneggiatrice Lina Wertmüller. Prima donna nella storia ad essere candidata all' Oscar come miglior regista, Lina racconta il suo rapporto con grandi personaggi del cinema come Lelio Luttazzi e Federico Fellini.

programme.title: Brindiamo! With Ornella Fado
programme.desc: Ornella Fado si trova a Roma e visita nel cuore di Roma a Piazza Navona il ristorante stellato "Il Convivio di Troiani" dello Chef Massimo Troiani. Insieme allo Chef Daniele Lippi cucinano dei piatti gustosi, quanto raffinati. Ornella intervista Massimo Troiani e partecipa come "USA Ambassador " alla serata di gala "Eccellenze Italiane" presso "La Pergola" dei Cavalieri Hilton, intervistando Il re degli Chef Heniz Beck.

programme.title: My Talented Friends Season 1
programme.desc: Ornella Fado presenta il lavoro artistico della sua amica Geniale,Paola Sinisgalli fondatrice della "Creative Shakes" il lavoro artistico di oggi e` un corto che vede Paola nei panni di regista.

programme.title: My Talented Friends Season 1
programme.desc: Ornella Fado introduce il suo amico Geniale Sergio Furnari, e presenta un docuemntario su un suo ultimo lavoro aritistico "Covid Hero Monument"

programme.title: Il CIRCOLO DEL BUONGUSTAI Con Fabio Campoli
programme.desc: Benvenuti a questo nuovo episodio del Circolo dei Buongustai! Cosa bolle in pentola? Oggi il nostro chef Fabio Campoli ci delizierà con tre ricette speciali: cono di stesa, venere nera, e babà al bergamotto. Buona visione a tutti!
